11.text: DEFAULT COSTS CERTIFICATE MADE BY THE DEPUTY REGISTRAR AYESHA BIN KALBAN

12.text: UPON the request for a Default Costs Certifi cate made by the Applicant on 30 June 2021 (the “Request”) pursuant to Rule 40.17 of the Rules of the DIFC Court (the “RDC”)

13.text: AND UPON the Applicant fi ling a Notice of Commencement of Assessment on 25 May 2021

14.text: AND UPON the Defendant’s failure to fi le its Points of Dispute, pursuant to Rule 40.15 of the RDC, within 21 days from the date the Claimant fi led the Notice of Commencement of Assessment pursuant to Rule 40.15

18.text: 2. The Defendant is ordered to pay a total USD 169,894.60 within 21 days from the date of this Order.
